debug_info.goal:
x : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

failed_attempts:
have h : ∀ t, HasDerivAt (fun t => (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t := fun t => by
    have h1 : HasDerivAt (fun t => t - 1) 1 t := (hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1
    have h2 : HasDerivAt exp (exp t) t := hasDerivAt_exp t
    have h3 := h1.mul h2
    simp only [one_mul] at h3
    ring_nf at h3 ⊢
    convert h3 using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun t _ => h t) (by continuity)]
  simp
  ring
